templates.title: Story Generator
templates.description: Generate creative stories with specific elements and themes.

variables.name: setting
variables.description: Where and when the story takes place

variables.name: character
variables.defaultValue: a renegade hacker with a mysterious past

variables.name: conflict
variables.defaultValue: a corrupt AI system controlling the city

variables.name: theme
variables.defaultValue: the nature of consciousness and freedom

examples:
Write a science fiction story with the following elements:
- Setting: a dystopian future city in 2150
- Main character: a renegade hacker with a mysterious past
- Conflict: a corrupt AI system controlling the city
- Theme: the nature of consciousness and freedom
- Tone: noir with moments of hope

The story should be around 1500 words and include:
- Vivid descriptions
- Engaging dialogue
- A satisfying conclusion
- At least one plot twist

templates.title: Poetry Generator
templates.description: Generate poems in various styles and forms.
templates.content:
Write a {{poem_type}} poem about {{topic}} in the style of {{style}}. The poem should:
- Use {{imagery}} imagery
- Evoke {{emotion}} emotions
- Include {{element}} as a central motif
- Be approximately {{length}} lines long

variables.name: poem_type
variables.description: Type of poem (sonnet, haiku, free verse, etc.)

examples:
Write a sonnet poem about the passage of time in the style of Romantic. The poem should:
- Use natural and seasonal imagery
- Evoke nostalgia and wonder emotions
- Include a flowing river as a central motif
- Be approximately 14 lines long
